texto: Destiny is no more than the fulfillment of purposive potentialities within us. The human cerebral cortex is a single sheet composed of more neurons than there are stars in the known universe folded like a paper crane to fit in a quart-sized cubbyhole
autor: there is enough potential energy in a single person that if released would equal thirty hydrogen bombs. Destiny is nothing to sneeze at!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a there is enough potential energy in a single person that if released would equal thirty hydrogen bombs. Destiny is nothing to sneeze at!: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Destiny is no more than the fulfillment of purposive potentialities within us. The human cerebral…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, brian-mcgreevy, hemlock-grove pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de hemlock-grove.
